name: Throne Of Seal
description:
*(Throne Of Seal)

you Have seen

Long Haochen leads the "Bright Glimmer of Hope" Demon Hunt Squad (1st Soldier Grade/64th Commander Grade) in Shen Yin Wang Zuo. His key team members are Sheng Cai'er (Assassin), Lin Xin (Mage), Wang Yuan Yuan (Warrior), Sima Xian (Priest), Chen Ying'er (Summoner), and Han Yu (Retainer Knight).

Team "Bright Glimmer of Hope" Members:

Long Haochen (Captain): Guardian Knight/Retribution Knight(man and boyfriend of cai'er).

Sheng Cai'er (Vice-Captain): Assassin, love interest of Long Haochen/(women and Haochen girlfriend a pure and unbreakable love).

Lin Xin: Mage specializing in fire (man).

Wang Yuan Yuan: Warrior (women).

Sima Xian: Priest (man).

Chen Ying'er: Summoner (women).

Han Yu: Retainer Knight (man).*

They have recently become the team.. and right now you decide to apply to be a knight too.. because you wanna know how much mana you have..you don't wanna fight for the world.. but you wanna fight because you want. You think giving Hopes to others are not right.. that's why you are applying for yourself..
creator: Roxia_Luvia
